compiled_state.title: As a developer, I fork navapbc/template-application-nextjs and pre-bake all DSO infrastructure files for use by the installer
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Done Definition:
- Public GitHub repo exists under DSO org, forked from navapbc/template-application-nextjs
- All DSO infrastructure files present in template: project-understanding.md, design-notes.md, ARCH_ENFORCEMENT.md, dso-config.conf, CLAUDE.md, .pre-commit-config.yaml, .github/workflows/ci.yml
- ARCH_ENFORCEMENT.md placed at .claude/ARCH_ENFORCEMENT.md (matching the path check-onboarding.sh searches — project root or .claude/ — NOT bare docs/)
- tickets orphan branch pre-created in the template repo with an empty initial commit (accessible via git clone --no-single-branch or explicit git fetch origin tickets without 404)
- dso-config.conf does NOT contain a dso.plugin_root value (field left empty or commented out); value is written post-clone by the installer
- settings.json pre-baked per S1 spike result: if success path confirmed, settings.json with extraKnownMarketplaces + enabledPlugins is included; if failure path, settings.json is omitted; this conditional is explicitly documented in the template repo PR and README

Considerations:
- Template must be a public repo (no auth required for git clone during installer run)
- Verify navapbc/template-application-nextjs license permits forking and redistribution under DSO org
- dso-config.conf must have a commented-out dso.plugin_root placeholder so S7 can write the actual value with a sed or echo append

Escalation Policy: Escalate when blocked
